emails.subject: Tradespark NDA
emails.body: Tana I finalized the Tradespark NDA since I know you are busy with Prebon. Michael Bridges called me this morning wondering where the final was. If you could print the attached on the proper letterhead, I will initial it and we can get it to Michael. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: TradeSpark NDA
emails.body: Tana Did we finalize the TradeSpark NDA yesterday? Please let me know. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Forwarded by Mark Greenberg/NA/Enron on 03/01/2001 09:06 AM "Fogel, Stephen" <SFogel@cantor.com> 03/01/2001 08:39 AM
